div.h1: Latency Budget Breakdown: Kernel-Bypass Network Stack
div.p: System Constraints: PCIe Gen4 x16, 100GbE NIC, NUMA-local, L3 Cache Resident

ol.li: L1 Pointer Access: Hardware prefetcher must be tuned to keep Δ < 4ns.
LLC Residency: Working set size must fit in L3 Cache (approx. 32-45MB) to avoid 100ns+ DRAM penality.
NUMA Affinity: CPU core and NIC PCIe lane must share the same Socket/Node.
Isolation: Kernels must be booted with isolcpus and nohz_full to prevent context switching.

g.text: NIC Hardware DMA -> PCIe Gen4 Write -> Host RAM
User-space Ring Buffer Polling (L1 Cache Hit Check)
Session Match: 4-Tuple Hash -> L3 Cache Pointer
TCP State Machine (Seq Verif / Win Update / ACK)
Zero-Copy Handoff to User Logic Space
Jitter Allowance: L3 Miss / NUMA Interconnect / Interrupts
